texto: Cookies don't make us fat. They're not to blame for our obesity epidemic. You know what else isn't to blame? Fast food, chips, candy, technology, soda, or anything else. The choices we make over a prolonged period time determine the width of our backsides and size of our pants. No one food, company, or activity is responsible for our obesity epidemic.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Shawn Weeks que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Cookies don't make us fat. They're not to blame for our obesity epidemic. You know what else isn'…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, blame, food, com foco em food e obesity.
